2604.25444.title: One Refiner to Unlock Them All: Inference-Time Reasoning Elicitation via Reinforcement Query Refinement
2604.25444.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often fail to utilize their latent reasoning capabilities due to a distributional mismatch between ambiguous human inquiries and the structured logic required for machine activation. Existing alignment methods either incur prohibitive $O(N)$ costs by fine-tuning each model individually or rely on static prompts that fail to resolve query-level structural complexity. In this paper, we propose ReQueR (\textbf{Re}inforcement \textbf{Que}ry \textbf{R}efinement), a modular framework that treats reasoning elicitation as an inference-time alignment task. We train a specialized Refiner policy via Reinforcement Learning to rewrite raw queries into explicit logical decompositions, treating frozen LLMs as the environment. Rooted in the classical Zone of Proximal Development from educational psychology, we introduce the Adaptive Solver Hierarchy, a curriculum mechanism that stabilizes training by dynamically aligning environmental difficulty with the Refiner's evolving competence. ReQueR yields consistent absolute gains of 1.7\%--7.2\% across diverse architectures and benchmarks, outperforming strong baselines by 2.1\% on average. Crucially, it provides a promising paradigm for one-to-many inference-time reasoning elicitation, enabling a single Refiner trained on a small set of models to effectively unlock reasoning in diverse unseen models. Code is available at https://github.com/newera-xiao/ReQueR.
2604.25444.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）常常無法充分利用其潛在的推理能力，因為模糊的人類詢問與機器啟動所需的結構邏輯之間存在分佈不匹配。現有的對齊方法要麼通過單獨微調每個模型而產生高達 $O(N)$ 的成本，要麼依賴靜態提示，這些提示無法解決查詢級別的結構複雜性。在本文中，我們提出了 ReQueR（\textbf{Re}inforcement \textbf{Que}ry \textbf{R}efinement），這是一個模組化框架，將推理引發視為推理時的對齊任務。我們通過強化學習訓練一個專門的 Refiner 策略，將原始查詢重寫為明確的邏輯分解，將冷凍的 LLM 視為環境。根植於教育心理學的經典最近發展區，我們引入了自適應解決者層級，這是一種課程機制，通過動態對齊環境難度與 Refiner 的不斷發展的能力來穩定訓練。ReQueR 在各種架構和基準上產生了一致的絕對增益，範圍為 1.7\%--7.2\%，平均超過強基準 2.1\%。關鍵是，它為一對多的推理引發提供了一個有前景的範式，使得在小型模型集上訓練的單一 Refiner 能夠有效地解鎖多樣的未見模型中的推理。代碼可在 https://github.com/newera-xiao/ReQueR 獲得。
2604.25444.author: Yixiao Zhou et.al.
2604.25444.authors: Yixiao Zhou, Dongzhou Cheng, zhiliang wu, Yi Yang, Yu Cheng, Hehe Fan
